analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of https://docs.ton.org/ covered 401 pages with 100.25% crawl coverage against 471 requested pages. API reference coverage is 74.66% across 129 detected API pages. Critical gaps include 0.0% example reliability, 24.44% SEO/geo issue rate, and only 1.75% of pages displaying freshness metadata. Overall audit confidence is 91.5% with 1 confirmed broken internal link.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100.25% (401 of 400 scope pages discovered)
Strong API reference coverage at 74.66% with 129 API pages detected
Minimal broken links: only 1 confirmed broken internal link in user-facing docs
No repository navigation link breakage (0 repo_broken_links_count)
risks: Zero example reliability (0.0%) indicates no working code examples detected or validated
High SEO/geo issue rate at 24.44% may impact discoverability and search rankings
Freshness metadata visible on only 1.75% of pages undermines content trust and currency perception
25.34% of API surface lacks reference documentation (100% - 74.66%)
6 links excluded from validation may hide additional broken link issues
Example detection methodology may have failed given 0.0% reliability on 401 pages
Low freshness coverage prevents users from assessing documentation recency

prioritized_actions.action: Implement last-updated timestamps on all documentation pages to address 1.75% freshness coverage
Audit and fix code examples to achieve measurable reliability above 0.0%
Resolve 24.44% SEO/geo issues (meta descriptions, titles, language tags, canonical URLs)
Document remaining 25.34% of API surface to reach 100% reference coverage
Fix 1 confirmed broken internal link and investigate 6 excluded links

limitations: External audit cannot verify technical accuracy of API documentation content or parameter descriptions
Example reliability at 0.0% may indicate detection methodology limitations rather than actual absence of examples
Audit cannot assess documentation completeness for unreleased or undocumented API features not present in crawled pages
SEO/geo issue detection limited to technical markup; does not evaluate content quality or localization accuracy
